{{Quote|Trade Federation ''Fastlatch'' models… illegal in most systems…|Jedi Qui-Gon Jinn|<ref name="The Aurorient Express 1" />}}
The '''''Fastlatch''-class defense droid''', also known simply as a '''fastlatch droid''', was a model of [[Security droid/Legends|defense/security droid]] developed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and made illegal in most [[Star system/Legends|star systems]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|These are commerical-grade security droids!|Jedi Obi-Wan Kenobi|<ref name="The Aurorient Express 1" />}}
The ''Fastlatch''-class defense droid<ref name="Saul Moegantz">{{CSWECite|II|322|Moegantz, Saul}}</ref> was a squat, self-activating [[Droid/Legends|droid]] consisting of a domed, clamshell body suspended by four pincer-like legs. It had twin [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] bracketing a single, central [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]], and an antenna protruding from the upper dome. These droids were known to become more aggressive towards targets the nearer the enemy got to the source of their programming. Though self-activated, the droids could be programmed to avoid attacking beings who carried repellent signal emitters.

==History==
A commercial-grade security droid<ref name="The Aurorient Express 1" /> developed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], the ''Fastlatch''-class defense droid was outlawed in most [[Star system/Legends|star systems]].<ref name="Fastlatch" />

In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]],<ref name="Dating">{{CSWECite|III|322|Waverton}} dates the [[Aurorient Express crisis|''Aurorient Express'' crisis]] to six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. As ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the Battle of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], it can be assumed that the ''[[Aurorient Express]]'' crisis took place in [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]].</ref> a group of [[pressure pirates]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] ''Fastlatch''-class droids aboard the ''[[Aurorient Express]]''. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] destroyed several on its hull while attempting to gain entry to the vessel, which was falling through the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Yorn Skot]].<ref name="The Aurorient Express 1" /> More ''Fastlatch'' droids were brought on board by [[Waverton]], in league with a band of [[pressure pirates]], as part of a scheduled cargo lot.

[[Clode Rhoden]] also had a larger version of the security droid specially developed to defend against [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. It was fitted with [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. Qui-Gon managed to reach Rhoden, and forced him to shut the droid down.
